results.description: Sri Vijaya Puram | May 23, 2026 Continuing its aggressive crackdown against narcotics trafficking and drug networks, the Anti-Narcotics Police Station of Andaman and Nicobar Police has achieved another significant breakthrough by arresting a local-based co-accused in connection with Anti-Narcotics Police Station FIR No. 08/2026 dated 17.04.2026 registered under Sections 20(b)(ii)(B)/29 of the NDPS Act, [...] The post Anti-Narcotics Police Station Arrests Local Co-Accused in 6.330 Kg Ganja Seizure Case appeared first on Nicobar Times .

results.title: Jupiter Transit in Cancer 2026 for Pisces(Meena) Ascendant: Career, fortune and growth
results.description: On June 2, 2026, Jupiter's move into Cancer marks a significant period for Pisces ascendants. This transit strengthens Jupiter, ruling both their self and career, while influencing their 5th house of personal growth, creativity, and children. The combined influence of Jupiter and Saturn on the ascendant emphasizes disciplined, structured growth and increased responsibility.

results.title: VIDEO: Watch highlights as Mexico beat Ghana in World Cup warm-up friendly
results.description: Mexico secured a 2-0 victory over Ghana in an international World Cup warm-up match in Puebla, scoring once in each half to maintain control throughout the encounter.Despite the defeat, the Black Stars, featuring several new faces, showed determination and produced a spirited performance against El Tri.Mexico made their intentions clear early at the Estadio Cuauhtemoc, taking the lead after Ghana goalkeeper Benjamin Asare misjudged a situation, allowing Brian Gutierrez to pounce and score. The hosts, featuring a squad largely built around home-based players, dictated the tempo for most of the first half and went into the break deservedly 1-0 up.Asare quickly recovered from his error, producing several important saves to keep Ghana in the contest and prevent Mexico from stretching their advantage before halftime. The Black Stars, who named a youthful team packed with debutants and U-23 players, began to grow into the game after the interval.Ghana’s best moment came when Sakyi rattled the post during a bright spell that briefly tilted momentum their way. However, Mexico soon reasserted control and doubled their lead in the 54th minute through Guillermo Martínez Ayala, whose composed finish effectively killed off Ghana’s hopes of a comeback.The friendly also...

results.title: Who Is Marine Dursus? Know More About Geno Auriemma’s New UConn Star
results.description: UConn Huskies coach Geno Auriemma has gotten the commitment of French professional player Marine Dursus, who will play for the Storrs school next season. Dursus spent three seasons playing for Angers Basket (UFAB 49) in La Boulangère Wonderligue, France’s top-tier women’s basketball division.

results.title: Tyler Lashbrook, Mike Williams Advance To Latter Stages Of Blazers' Head Coach Search
results.description: Boston Celtics assistant Tyler Lashbrook and Utah Jazz assistant Mike Williams have advanced to the latter stages of the Portland Trail Blazers' head coach search, according to Marc Stein of The Stein Line. The two join Tiago Splitter, Jeff Van Gundy and Micah Nori as finalists for the job. Candidates will fly into Portland this weekend for in-person interviews.
